events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: this fails as a code violation of NEC 430.102(B)(1), which requires the motor disconnecting means to be within sight of the motor (or lockable in the open position at the equipment under a documented exception). Risk rated high due to the lockout/tagout hazard for personnel servicing the motor.
